import json, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, statistics, itertools, math, textwrap
import json, re, unicodedata, difflib, os, math, statistics

# Load files
quran_path = '/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json'

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)
len(quran_data), type(quran_data)

# Inspect a sample
quran_data[0].keys(), quran_data[0]

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)
type(hadith_data), len(hadith_data)

# Inspect sample keys
hadith_data[0].keys(), hadith_data[0]

import re, unicodedata, difflib

AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
PUNCT = r'[\u0600-\u0605\u061B\u061F\u066A-\u066D\u06D4\u06D6-\u06ED\.\,\:\;\!\?\-\–\—\(\)\[\]\{\}\'"\/\\\|\~\`\^\_\+\=\*]'
SPACES = re.compile(r'\s+')

# unify hamza/alef forms
def unify_arabic(s):
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('گ','ك').replace('ة','ه')
    return s

def normalize(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = s.strip()
    # remove diacritics
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # lower? Arabic has no case; but keep
    # unify hamza etc
    s = unify_arabic(s)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(PUNCT, ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = SPACES.sub(' ', s).strip()
    return s

def ratio(a,b):
    return difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=normalize(a), b=normalize(b)).ratio()

# Prepare a corpus of hadith searchable texts: choose Matn if available otherwise hadithTxt
hadith_texts = []
for h in hadith_data:
    text = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    if text:
        hadith_texts.append((h['hadithID'], text))
len(hadith_texts)

# also load quran ayah_text
quran_texts = [( (q['surah_id'], q['ayah_id']), q['ayah_text']) for q in quran_data ]
len(quran_texts)

full_span = "لا تَزَوَّجَنَّ شُرَّعَتكَ"
snippet = "لا تَزَوَّ...شُرَّعَتكَ"
norm_full = normalize(full_span)
norm_full, normalize(snippet)

# Search for normalized substring matches in hadiths
target = norm_full
candidates = []
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    if target in ntext:
        candidates.append((hid, text))
len(candidates)

# Search for partial tokens: look for "لا تزوج" and "شرع"
tok1 = "لا تزوج"
tok2 = "شرع"
cands_partial = []
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    if tok1 in ntext and tok2 in ntext:
        cands_partial.append((hid, text))
len(cands_partial)

# Search for occurrences of 'لا تزوج' in hadith
tok = "لا تزوج"
hits = []
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    if tok in ntext:
        hits.append((hid, text))
len(hits)

# show few
hits[:3]

# Search hadiths for words containing شرع (in normalized)
matches_sharia = []
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    if 'شرع' in ntext:
        matches_sharia.append((hid, text))
len(matches_sharia)
matches_sharia[:5]

search_phrase = normalize("لا تَزَوَّجَنَّ")
matches_latzawajanna = []
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    if search_phrase in ntext:
        matches_latzawajanna.append((hid, text))
len(matches_latzawajanna)

# Search for words starting with 'لا تز' to catch "لا تزَوَّج"
matches_lataz = []
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    if re.search(r'\bلا تز\w+', ntext):
        matches_lataz.append((hid, text))
len(matches_lataz)

# Inspect sample around matches to see if any "تزوج" forms appear
sample = []
for hid, text in matches_lataz[:20]:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    m = re.search(r'(.{0,30}لا تز\w+.{0,30})', ntext)
    sample.append((hid, m.group(1) if m else ntext[:100]))
sample[:10]

# search for 'تزوج' tokens in hadith
tazawaj_matches = []
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    if 'تزوج' in ntext:
        tazawaj_matches.append((hid, text))
len(tazawaj_matches)

# any 'لا ' within +/- 10 chars of 'تزوج'?
near_no = []
for hid, text in tazawaj_matches:
    ntext = normalize(text)
    for m in re.finditer('تزوج', ntext):
        start = max(0, m.start()-10)
        segment = ntext[start:m.start()+10]
        if 'لا ' in segment:
            near_no.append((hid, text, segment))
            break
len(near_no), near_no[:5]

# compute similarity ratio for all hadith texts vs the full span
full = full_span
snip_approx = "لا تزوج شرعتك"  # normalized snippet approximated
top = []
for hid, text in hadith_texts[:5000]:  # sample to start
    r = ratio(full, text)
    if r > 0.6:
        top.append((r, hid, text[:300]))
len(top), sorted(top, reverse=True)[:5]

# compute overall for entire dataset
best = (0, None, None)
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    r = ratio(full, text)
    if r > best[0]:
        best = (r, hid, text)
best

# best ratio vs quran
best_q = (0, None, None)
for key, text in quran_texts:
    r = ratio(full, text)
    if r > best_q[0]:
        best_q = (r, key, text)
best_q

full_snippet = "لا تَزَوَّ...شُرَّعَتكَ"
norm_snip = normalize(full_snippet)
norm_snip

# best ratio for snippet to hadiths
best_snip = (0, None, None)
for hid, text in hadith_texts:
    r = ratio(norm_snip, text)
    if r > best_snip[0]:
        best_snip = (r, hid, text)
best_snip
